triggered_passive.description: Spawns a geometric AoE burst on successful hit for 20% weapon damage
Grants a secondary active skill slot not found in the skill tree
Grants +15% elemental resistance for 2s after being hit
Cleanses one CC effect and grants 1s CC-immunity on being CCed
10% chance to stun attacker for 0.3s on being hit
Cleanses one CC effect and grants 1s CC-immunity on being CCed
Passive: +8% damage bonus to gear-element skill damage
Passive: +8% resource regeneration rate while equipped
